full_text:
Ding Gong (Yuanxiong) 丁宮 (元雄)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Gong (丁宮), styledYuanxiong (元雄), was born in Pei. Recommended Shi Yi to the court, held high posts for the Han. Ding Gong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo.
